top_findings.title: No source code delivered — workspace is empty
top_findings.evidence: find . in run_dir lists only TASK.md, logs, and *.json; there are no .rs files, no Cargo.toml, no src/, no README.md. _agent_stdout.log claims to have created src/lib.rs, src/main.rs, Cargo.toml, README.md, but the file-mutation verifier reports write_file was 'Refusing to write to sensitive system path' for Cargo.toml.
top_findings.suggestion: Fix the agent harness so writes target the run workspace (relative paths), not the host temp dir; treat this run as a hard failure regardless of cached scores.

top_findings.title: scores.json is inconsistent with the archive (test_coverage=1.0 but zero code/tests exist)
top_findings.evidence: scores.json reports test_coverage=1.0 but the workspace contains no buildable code or tests; no matching row exists in retort.db. Scores appear cached/stale.
top_findings.suggestion: Do not trust these scores; re-score against the actual (empty) archive or mark the run failed.

top_findings.title: POST /books not delivered
top_findings.evidence: No source files in workspace; no create route exists on disk.
top_findings.suggestion: Deliver a create-book route in the workspace.

top_findings.title: GET /books (list) not delivered
top_findings.evidence: No source files in workspace; no list route exists on disk.

top_findings.suggestion: Deliver author filtering on the list route.
